results.requirement_text: The system shall require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard.

test_cases.title: Verify dashboard access is denied when updated terms have not been accepted
test_cases.objective: Validate that the system blocks dashboard access for users who have not accepted the updated terms.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability without having accepted the updated terms.

assumptions: Mechanism for presenting updated terms and capturing acceptance not specified
Exact method of denying access not specified
Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available
